risk_signals.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X)

messages.content: Complete payment in your UPI app.

upi_intent_uri_format.url_encoding_note: Spaces encoded as %20 per RFC 3986, not +

android_intent_execution.code:
Intent intent = new Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse(credential.intent_uri));
startActivity(intent);
android_intent_execution.fallback: If no UPI apps available, show continue_url or QR code
android_intent_execution.npci_requirement: MUST support generic/implicit intent (not targeting specific TPAPs by default)

ios_url_scheme_execution.fallback: Render QR code or redirect to continue_url on failure

webview_execution.note: Automatic fallback to QR if UPI app doesn't open

desktop_qr_execution.display_text: Scan with any UPI app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, etc.)

polling_for_completion.on_timeout: Offer retry with new credential or switch to different payment method

webhook_payment_authorized.merchant_action: Verify signature, update checkout status to completed, call ACP confirmation endpoint

webhook_payment_failed.merchant_action: Update checkout status to canceled, surface retry to user via get_checkout response

error_payment_declined_user.message: Payment was declined by the UPI app. Please retry or choose a different payment method.

error_insufficient_funds.message: Insufficient funds. Please add funds to your UPI account and retry.
error_insufficient_funds.platform_action: Suggest adding funds or choosing different method

error_merchant_vpa_invalid.message: Merchant UPI configuration error. Please contact merchant support.
error_merchant_vpa_invalid.platform_action: Surface error to user, suggest contacting merchant

error_bank_debit_failed.message: Bank declined the debit. Please retry in 5 minutes or use a different UPI app.
error_bank_debit_failed.platform_action: Suggest retry or alternative UPI app

error_daily_limit_exceeded.message: Daily/per-transaction UPI limit exceeded. Please try tomorrow or use a different payment method.
error_daily_limit_exceeded.platform_action: Explain limit, offer tomorrow retry or alternative

error_timeout.message: Payment time expired. Please retry with a new QR code or intent link.
error_timeout.platform_action: Generate new credential and offer retry

error_network_unavailable.message: UPI network temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a few minutes.

flow_summary.step_1_discover: Platform detects com.razorpay.upi.intent in App manifest; checks context.country == 'IN'
flow_summary.step_2_request: Widget calls window.openai.requestCheckout with payment_type: upi_intent
flow_summary.step_3_mcp: Platform calls merchant MCP initiate_upi_payment tool
flow_summary.step_4_escalation: Merchant returns requires_escalation with credential (intent_uri, qr_code_data)
flow_summary.step_5_execution: Platform executes based on device: Android implicit intent, iOS URL scheme, or Desktop QR
flow_summary.step_6_poll: Platform polls merchant MCP get_checkout every 5 seconds
flow_summary.step_7_webhook: Razorpay webhook hits merchant; merchant updates checkout status
flow_summary.step_8_complete: Platform calls complete_checkout with UPI-specific payment confirmation
